subject: Q3 Budget Review - Action Required
body:
Hi there,

Please review the Q3 budget proposal attached. The deadline for submission is 2026-07-15. We need your approval before we can proceed with the marketing campaign.

This is urgent - please respond by end of week.

Best,
Alice Johnson
Acme Corp Finance

subject: FLASH SALE: 50% Off All Software Licenses!
body:
Don't miss out! For a limited time, get 50% off all software licenses. Click here to claim your discount code: http://deals.techdeals.com/promo

Unsubscribe | Terms | Privacy

This is a promotional message from TechDeals.com

subject: Your Monthly Subscription Invoice
body:
Dear Customer,

Your monthly Streamflix subscription has been processed. Amount charged: $14.99. Next billing date: 2026-08-05.

To view your invoice, visit your account settings.

Thank you for your continued subscription.

Streamflix Billing Team

subject: CS 401 Project Report Due Next Week
body:
Hello everyone,

Just a reminder that your CS 401 semester project reports are due on 2026-07-12. Please submit through the course portal. The final presentation will be scheduled for the following week.

Office hours are Tuesday and Thursday 2-4pm if you need help.

Regards,
Prof. Davis

subject: Interview Follow-up: Senior Developer Position
body:
Dear Candidate,

Thank you for interviewing with GlobalTech last week. We were impressed with your experience and would like to invite you for a second round interview.

Could you please confirm your availability for a panel interview next Wednesday at 2pm? We would appreciate a response within 48 hours.

Best regards,
GlobalTech HR Team

subject: CONGRATULATIONS! You Won $5,000,000!!!
body:
YOU ARE A WINNER!!! You have been selected to receive $5,000,000 in the International Lottery Sweepstakes! To claim your prize, simply reply with your bank account details and social security number. This is a limited time offer - act now!

Congratulations again on your amazing luck!

subject: Sprint planning tomorrow at 10am
body:
Hey,

Quick reminder that we have sprint planning tomorrow (July 7th) at 10am. Please come prepared with your task estimates and any blockers from the current sprint.

Zoom link: https://zoom.us/j/123456

See you there!

subject: Invoice #INV-2026-0789 Due Payment
body:
Dear Valued Customer,

This is a friendly reminder that invoice #INV-2026-0789 for $2,350.00 is due for payment by 2026-07-20. Please process this payment at your earliest convenience to avoid any late fees.

You can pay online at: https://supplies-pro.com/pay

Thank you for your business.

Supplies Pro Billing
